description: Day three of Breakpoint 2021 features discussions on NFTs, including a panel moderated by Jordan Pretty, focusing on their applications in gaming, art, and social media. Workshops will also cover NFT developments on Solana, including a session by Neon Labs.
topic_summary: The session explores the evolution and impact of NFTs on Solana, featuring insights from industry leaders and discussions on past projects that shaped the NFT landscape [t=198.08].
